name: keyboard-layout-visualizer
title: Keyboard Layout Visualizer
description: Visualizes your qmk/zmk keyboard layout and layers so you never forget where a key is again!
author: alliecatowo

commands.name: show-layout
commands.title: View Keymap
commands.description: Display your active keyboard's layout and layers

commands.name: search-keys
commands.title: Find a Key
commands.description: Search for any key across all your boards and layers

commands.name: manage-boards
commands.title: My Boards
commands.description: Browse and manage your keyboard profiles

commands.name: add-board
commands.title: Add Board
commands.description: Detect a keyboard over USB or import a keymap file

commands.name: import-github
commands.title: Import from GitHub
commands.description: Browse a public GitHub repo and import a keymap file

commands.name: board-settings
commands.title: Board Settings
commands.description: Configure QMK settings, RGB, and tap-hold timing on your Vial keyboard

commands.name: keypress-tester
commands.title: Keypress Tester
commands.description: Test which keys have been pressed on your keyboard

commands.name: layer-indicator
commands.title: Layer Indicator
commands.description: Menu bar indicator showing your active keyboard layer

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
